overview: Living Statue is a Normal-class Construct/Undead monster found in Inferno, Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 100 HP, 22 physical damage, 120 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack01 Combo at 160% ratio (352 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 250.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Attack01 (150%), Attack02 (150%), Attack01 Combo (160%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Silence
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Silence icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire, Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500), Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 250, ability check distance 350
strategies.description: Combat area radius 250. Ability check distance 350.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
